description:
When a phase completes, its structured output (from output contracts) should be persisted and injected into the next phase's prompt. Currently each phase starts fresh with only task title/description.

Changes needed:
1. Persist phase output JSON to .ao/state/workflows/<workflow_id>/phase-outputs/<phase_id>.json on phase completion
2. In phase_executor.rs build_phase_prompt(): load prior phase outputs and inject as context
3. Add __PRIOR_PHASE_OUTPUTS__ template variable to WORKFLOW_PHASE_PROMPT_TEMPLATE
4. Summarize/truncate prior outputs to respect token budgets (configurable max_prior_context_tokens)
5. Include phase decision signals (verdict, reasoning) in the injected context
6. Add tests: verify phase output persistence, verify injection into next phase prompt

This overlaps with REQ-032 (Persistent Agent Memory) Phase 1 — cross-phase memory is the same feature.

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/workflow_executor/phase_executor.rs (prompt construction, lines 753-813)
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/lifecycle_executor.rs (phase completion handling)
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_phase_pool.rs (phase result processing)
title: Add cross-phase data passing via persisted phase outputs
